titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2615
GA 2615
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: ερχομενα changed to επερχομενα at 18.5 by David Parker.
Block marker for 10.18 moved back one word by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 15.10 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 12.15 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 5.5, supplied letter added at 13.6 by David Parker.

body.note: Status: G-A Number: 2615Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 190rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: Alan BaleTranscription begun: Transcription finished: 03-02-2012 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - Yes - F223v, 12.40 Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks:

ab.note: This was erased and then a red line drawn in its place.
π meant to be in margin but not visible.
ε meant to be in margin but not visible.
